epagomenal_1_1.question: "What passed through disruption this year that became stronger for having been broken and gathered?"

epagomenal_2_1.question: "When I see the year from horizon to horizon, what does the whole reveal that the parts could not?"

epagomenal_3_1.question: "Where is my force out of its proper place? Where would placing it rightly strengthen what it currently threatens?"

epagomenal_4_1.question: "What will require skillful protection — the intelligence that restores what force alone cannot repair — in the year opening before me?"

epagomenal_5_1.question: "Can I mourn the year that is ending and welcome the one that is opening — without abandoning one for the other?"

hathor_10_1.question: "What debts of gratitude am I carrying into the next cycle because I have not yet named and offered them?"

hathor_1_1.question: "What held, and at what cost? What broke, and who is owed for it?"

hathor_23_3.question: "Can I form this without judging it yet?"

hathor_2_1.question: "Where have I treated my body as expendable rather than as the vessel through which I serve?"

hathor_3_1.question: "What disorder have I been living around because correcting it felt like one thing too many?"

hathor_4_1.question: "When I choose joy today, what am I publicly claiming about what has been preserved?"

hathor_5_1.question: "Does my household reflect the level of Maʿat I say I am committed to?"

hathor_6_1.question: "Whose weeping have I caused this season by withholding what I owed them?"

hathor_7_1.question: "Is what I made today for me, or for the world that sustains me?"

hathor_8_1.question: "Am I working to restore order, or to perform the appearance of effort?"

hathor_9_1.question: "What does my conduct actually say I am? Is that the person I am willing to publicly stand as?"

kaherka_13_2.question: "Am I nurturing revival or starving it?"

kaherka_16_2.question: "Does my rhythm honor life or exhaust it?"

kaherka_17_2.question: "Where am I pretending I can carry this alone?"

kaherka_18_2.question: "Where do I belong that I have been avoiding?"

kaherka_1_1.question: "What needs silence before it can be placed?"

kaherka_20_2.question: "Do I honor the part of me that stayed?"

kaherka_21_3.question: "Am I working or am I proving?"

kaherka_25_3.question: "What flame must I tend to keep this alive?"

kaherka_26_3.question: "Who rows beside me in this season?"

kaherka_28_3.question: "Am I remembering the source while I act?"

kaherka_30_3.question: "What am I carrying into the next month?"

kaherka_4_1.question: "What good in this still feeds me?"

kaherka_5_1.question: "Is my body ready to carry what I am placing?"

kaherka_7_1.question: "What am I planting with my mouth?"

mswtRa_10_1.question: "What exits this decan in right condition for the hidden passage? What has not yet been cleared?"

mswtRa_11_2.question: "Am I genuinely awake in this stillness, or have I mistaken quiet for permission to stop attending?"

mswtRa_12_2.question: "Where am I shortening a stage that the ordered passage requires to be complete?"

mswtRa_13_2.question: "Am I closing this because I understand it, or to avoid having to understand it?"

mswtRa_14_2.question: "What have I been carrying as something I will get to, that must be placed before the year closes?"

mswtRa_15_2.question: "Has readiness been maintained, or has disorder re-entered what was cleared?"

mswtRa_16_2.question: "Where am I beginning the new year inside the old one because waiting in stillness is uncomfortable?"

mswtRa_17_2.question: "What distraction am I using to avoid the deepest point of the year's completion?"

mswtRa_18_2.question: "Is my stillness active and attended, or passive and drifting?"

mswtRa_19_2.question: "What am I tempted to announce or act on that needs more time in the hidden condition?"

mswtRa_1_1.question: "What am I still treating as active when the year has already completed it?"

mswtRa_20_2.question: "What has the hidden passage required of me? Have I given it?"

mswtRa_21_3.question: "Can I read the final measure accurately, without adding anxiety or premature hope?"

mswtRa_22_3.question: "What am I adding because readiness makes me anxious, rather than because it is genuinely needed?"

mswtRa_23_3.question: "Can I hold the form of becoming without rushing it toward either the old year or the new?"

mswtRa_24_3.question: "Am I respecting the timing that Ma'at requires, or my own desire for the new year to begin?"

mswtRa_25_3.question: "Is there anything standing between the year's completion and a clean crossing into Heriu Renpet?"

mswtRa_26_3.question: "What am I keeping burning that should go out so the new fire can arise?"

mswtRa_27_3.question: "Have I given the ending of the year the acknowledgment that its completion deserves?"

mswtRa_28_3.question: "Can I recognize completion without immediately filling it with the next beginning?"

mswtRa_29_3.question: "Can I be ready without being active? Can I hold the threshold without pushing through it?"

mswtRa_2_1.question: "What has been sitting on the altar that was never truly offered?"

mswtRa_30_3.question: "Has the year been sealed with the honor its completion deserves?"

mswtRa_3_1.question: "What record am I leaving open that will drag its incompletion into the next cycle?"

mswtRa_4_1.question: "What residue from the year am I carrying that does not belong in the next cycle?"

mswtRa_5_1.question: "What am I insisting on continuing past its completion because I am not ready to acknowledge the ending?"

mswtRa_6_1.question: "What am I checking, touching, or exposing that needs to gather without interference?"

mswtRa_7_1.question: "Where am I refusing to allow something to enter the dark when its time has come?"

mswtRa_8_1.question: "What am I still pressing that has already given all it has to give this year?"

mswtRa_9_1.question: "Does my conduct in the year's stillest month reflect the standing I am building?"

paophi_10_1.question: "How does my work stabilize Ma'at around me?"

paophi_11_2.question: "Who depends on me staying connected, not disappearing?"

paophi_12_2.question: "What can I send that proves you are not abandoned?"

paophi_13_2.question: "How do I keep this connection alive without chaos?"

paophi_14_2.question: "Is this relationship mutual, or am I draining or being drained?"

paophi_15_2.question: "Who is holding it down in silence, and have I honored them?"

paophi_16_2.question: "Where is Ma'at wobbling right now, and how can I steady it?"

paophi_17_2.question: "What tone am I sending into rooms I'm not physically in?"

paophi_19_2.question: "Do I understand the system I'm part of, or am I just reacting?"

paophi_1_1.question: "What work is truly mine to move?"

paophi_20_2.question: "Can I honor this whole body of effort, not just the piece I touch?"

paophi_21_3.question: "What territory, people, or system am I responsible for protecting right now?"

paophi_24_3.question: "Where is someone faking alignment with Ma'at but actually draining it?"

paophi_25_3.question: "What line must be redrawn so balance survives?"

paophi_26_3.question: "Who should really be holding this role?"

paophi_27_3.question: "Do we all understand what we just agreed to?"

paophi_28_3.question: "Can I speak the real status without flinching?"

paophi_29_3.question: "What needs to be fixed today so it won't break tomorrow?"

paophi_2_1.question: "Who is moving beside me in this season?"

paophi_30_3.question: "Did I act as keeper of Ma'at, or as owner?"

paophi_3_1.question: "Can I continue this rhythm for 10 days without collapse?"

paophi_4_1.question: "Do I see my labor as honor or insult?"

paophi_5_1.question: "Where can balanced effort keep us all upright?"

paophi_6_1.question: "Does this weight belong to my purpose?"

paophi_7_1.question: "Does my language reflect who I actually am?"

paophi_8_1.question: "What restores the one holding the load?"

paophi_9_1.question: "Where is this going, and who will it feed?"

rekhwer_10_1.question: "What do I know now that I did not know ten days ago?"

rekhwer_11_2.question: "Am I acting from knowledge or still gathering it?"

rekhwer_13_2.question: "What part of this have I been avoiding?"

rekhwer_14_2.question: "Am I moving at the pace the field needs?"

rekhwer_15_2.question: "Where is the weakest point in what I am building?"

rekhwer_16_2.question: "What would cause me to lose what I have learned?"

rekhwer_17_2.question: "Whose knowledge am I not yet using?"

rekhwer_19_2.question: "What does the reading require me to change?"

rekhwer_1_1.question: "Do I know what I am tending?"

rekhwer_20_2.question: "What does the field need from the last decan?"

rekhwer_21_3.question: "What do I know well enough to teach?"

rekhwer_22_3.question: "Is the gap closed or still costing the field?"

rekhwer_23_3.question: "Will this method hold into the next month?"

rekhwer_24_3.question: "Am I working at the level I have built?"

rekhwer_25_3.question: "Who or what carries this knowledge after me?"

rekhwer_27_3.question: "What does the full field tell me?"

rekhwer_28_3.question: "Did I work with the quality Ma'at would recognize?"

rekhwer_29_3.question: "What does the next month require that this one did not?"

rekhwer_2_1.question: "What does the field say before I say anything?"

rekhwer_30_3.question: "What knowledge do I carry out of this month?"

rekhwer_3_1.question: "Is this the right tool for what this requires?"

rekhwer_4_1.question: "What do I not know that is costing the field?"

rekhwer_5_1.question: "Where is my technique costing more than it should?"

rekhwer_6_1.question: "Am I applying knowledge or just force?"

rekhwer_7_1.question: "What do I know that someone nearby needs?"

rekhwer_9_1.question: "Is the knowledge recorded or only in my head?"

renwet_10_1.question: "What exits the first decan of the beautiful year with its honest accounting complete?"

renwet_11_2.question: "Who has a claim on what this year produced that I have not yet discharged?"

renwet_12_2.question: "Who needs what I have that I am not giving because they did not contribute to producing it?"

renwet_13_2.question: "Whose contribution to my harvest am I receiving without acknowledging or distributing toward?"

renwet_14_2.question: "Where am I framing an obligation as a generosity, which lets me decide against it?"

renwet_15_2.question: "What has been owed since the harvest arrived that I have not yet closed?"

renwet_16_2.question: "What am I holding that exceeds my share while someone else's need goes unmet?"

renwet_17_2.question: "Am I grateful only for what was pleasant, or for the complete arc of what this year required?"

renwet_18_2.question: "Is my gratitude specific enough to create accountability in the next cycle?"

renwet_19_2.question: "Where have I given from the harvest without receiving what the exchange produces in return?"

renwet_1_1.question: "Am I still striving past the point where receiving is what Maʿat now requires?"

renwet_20_2.question: "Does the distribution reflect Maʿat — given according to obligation, not according to preference?"

renwet_21_3.question: "What has this year produced that, seeded forward, would yield better in the next?"

renwet_22_3.question: "Am I consuming what should be seeded because it is here and the future feels distant?"

renwet_23_3.question: "Am I seeding the next year with the best of this one, or with what is convenient to keep?"

renwet_24_3.question: "Is what I am holding back from this year held as a vow, or merely as storage?"

renwet_25_3.question: "Is the record honest enough to be useful in the next cycle — or to those who come after?"

renwet_26_3.question: "What do I understand about this year that I could not have understood while inside any single month of it?"

renwet_27_3.question: "Am I giving thanks for the year, or only for its comfortable portions?"

renwet_28_3.question: "What would be missing from the year if any of its difficult months had not happened?"

renwet_29_3.question: "What do the remaining months of Shemu require that this month must have prepared?"

renwet_2_1.question: "Does the harvest reflect what was actually done, or what I want to believe was done?"

renwet_30_3.question: "Is the first harvest month complete in all its obligations, or does anything remain undischarged?"

renwet_3_1.question: "Am I inflating the yield to feel good about the year, or deflating it from habit? What is actually here?"

renwet_4_1.question: "Whose labor am I benefiting from without naming in the harvest record?"

renwet_5_1.question: "Am I distributing from an accurate count, or from a general sense of abundance that may not be accurate?"

renwet_6_1.question: "What am I claiming entirely for myself that has roots in what I did not produce alone?"

renwet_7_1.question: "Am I consuming the full harvest because it is here, without accounting for what comes after?"

renwet_8_1.question: "Where am I deferring the harvest out of habit, fear, or the refusal to acknowledge what was earned?"

renwet_9_1.question: "Does the harvest reflect the quality of care I gave to what I tended? If not, what does it actually reflect?"

sefbedet_11_2.question: "Am I feeding the root or performing care?"

sefbedet_12_2.question: "What is the next step, not the next leap?"

sefbedet_13_2.question: "What would damage this if it came now?"

sefbedet_14_2.question: "Does this have a rhythm or just intention?"

sefbedet_15_2.question: "Who belongs in this field with me?"

sefbedet_16_2.question: "Where is this leaning that will become a problem?"

sefbedet_17_2.question: "Am I resting enough to sustain this?"

sefbedet_20_2.question: "What does the whole field look like?"

sefbedet_21_3.question: "Have I let this stay long enough to root?"

sefbedet_24_3.question: "What held the ground so this could grow?"

sefbedet_27_3.question: "Am I still treating this as more fragile than it is?"

sefbedet_28_3.question: "What did I tend that Ma'at can weigh?"

sefbedet_29_3.question: "Am I ready for what the next season asks?"

sefbedet_2_1.question: "Am I moving too fast for what is growing?"

sefbedet_7_1.question: "Who can see this without damaging it?"

sefbedet_8_1.question: "Am I showing up for the ordinary maintenance?"

sefbedet_9_1.question: "What is the honest condition of this?"

thoth_1_1.question: "What truth am I willing to build upon?"

thoth_20_2.question: "What lesson is ready to move forward?"

thoth_21_3.question: "What role do I hold now, without apology?"

thoth_22_3.question: "What drains me that I will no longer permit?"

thoth_24_3.question: "Who or what pulls me off my path?"

thoth_25_3.question: "Do I have what I need to sustain this identity?"

thoth_27_3.question: "Does the world see the real current I'm carrying?"

thoth_2_1.question: "How does my life look when it is aligned?"

thoth_30_3.question: "What identity is now permanent going forward?"

thoth_3_1.question: "What must be cleared to make way?"

thoth_4_1.question: "What do I call forth into being?"

thoth_7_1.question: "What noise needs to quiet for clarity to speak?"

thoth_9_1.question: "What is the first visible sign of alignment?"
